name: Chipotle Sauce#1
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: You can make this sauce as hot as you want by adding up to a total of 4 dried Chipotle chiles.
Cover the chipotle chiles with warm water. Let stand until softened, about 1 hour.
Drain and finely chop the chilies.
Cook and stir the bacon and onion in a 2-quart saucepan until the bacon is crisp.
Stir in the chilies and remaining ingredients.
Makes about 4 cups of sauce.
